# PHAssetEditOperation.properties

**Case**

The asset’s metadata properties can be edited.

## Declaration

```swift
case properties
```

## Discussion

To change an asset’s properties, create a change request with the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetChangeRequest/init(for:)] method inside a [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHPhotoLibrary] change block.

## Constants

- **PHAssetEditOperation.delete**: The asset can be deleted from the photo library.
- **PHAssetEditOperation.content**: The asset’s photo or video content can be edited.
